goals: Explore the project structure to understand what kind of technology project this is
Find relevant files related to agricultural concepts or functionality
Search for specific implementations or terms of interest
Examine code details to understand how the technology works

user_agent_config.personality: Curious and methodical. Explores systematically to understand unfamiliar technical projects.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Domain expert in agricultural technology research but unfamiliar with codebases and search tools.

end_condition: The user has explored the project structure, identified relevant agricultural technology files, and examined the implementation details.
